description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on push and pull request events for specific file paths, and allows manual dispatch. The workflow uses a concurrency group and cancels in-progress jobs. It defines two jobs, linux and windows, each with a matrix strategy for different compilers, linkers, and build types. The linux job runs on ubuntu-latest and installs dependencies, checks toml.hpp, and builds and tests with Meson. The windows job runs on windows-2022 and installs dependencies, configures Meson, and builds and tests.
